Madhavi all set on starting her own small business. But this time she is planning on experimenting with her business ideas. Will her business be a success? Let's find out!

About The Show:
----------------------------
Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah is a comedy show inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chashmah' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This show revolves around Gada Family which consists of uneducated Businessman Jethalal Champaklal Gada, Jethalal’s Wife Daya & their naughty Son Tipendra Gada living in 'Gokuldham Co-operative Society' and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. In case of a problem and emergency, Jethalal Gada often rushes to Taarak Mehta to seek his help and guidance as he finds a philosopher in him. The residents of the housing society, help each other find solutions when they face common, real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

snippet.title: NEW! Ep 3172 - Kya Champak Chacha Popatlal Ko Pehchan Payenge?! | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer
Munmun Dutta as Babita Krishnan Iyer
Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide
Sonalika Joshi as Madhvi Aatmaram Bhide
Nidhi Bhanushali / Palak Sidhwani as Sonalika Aatmaram Bhide (Sonu) 
Gurucharan Singh/ Balwinder suri as Roshan Singh Harjeet Singh Sodhi
Jennifer Mistry Bansiwal as Roshan Kaur Roshan Singh Sodhi
Kavi Kumar Azad / Nirmal Soni as Dr. Hansraj Hathi 
Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj Hathi
Kush Shah as Gulabkumar Hansraj Hathi (Goli)
Shyam Pathak as Popatlal Pandey
Sharad Sankla as Abdul
Azhar Shaikh as Pinku 

Produced By: Neela Asit Modi, Asit Kumarr Modi 
Special Thanks: Mahesh Vakil, Indu Tarak Mehta

snippet.title: How my Red Velvet Cake became a flop 😪 | Ishaani Krishna.
snippet.description:
#RedVelvetCakeGoneWrong #Flopcake #IshaaniKrishna

Okay so this is what happened...

I'm still only getting used to my oven.
I've not yet learnt to use it perfectly.
So there's this knob that comes below the temperature knob known as the "Function Select Knob".
I was supposed to put it at "Bake Mode", but I unknowingly set it at "Toast Mode" and thus my cake got slightly burnt or crispy (like bread toast) I'd say.
The recipe as such was actually correct 🥺

Okay bye 🥲

snippet.title: KHASA AALA CHAHAR : Hostel Life (Full Song) | New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021 | Haryanvi Songs
snippet.description:
White Hill Dhaakad presents Latest Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021 Hostel Life by "Khasa Aala Chahar". Lyrics written & Composed Khasa Aala Chahar. Music by Bamboo Beats. Directed by Ameet Choudhary. Produced By Gunbir Singh Sidhu & Manmord Sidhu.

Also Available On :-

♪Spotify : https://open.spotify.com/track/27ESVcI1YUzty5owmFq8yd?si=1003163181114248
♪Apple Music : https://music.apple.com/in/album/hostel-life-single/1568522400
♪iTunes : https://music.apple.com/in/album/hostel-life/1568522400?i=1568522859
♪JioSaavn : https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/hostel-life/FSQfdR9maHQ
♪Gaana : https://gaana.com/song/hostel-life-1
♪Amazon Music : https://www.amazon.com/Hostel-Life-Khasa-Aala-Chahar/dp/B095DYDSTV/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=Hostel+Life+Khasa+Aala+Chahar&qid=1621829975&s=dmusic&sr=1-1
♪Amazon Prime Music : https://music.amazon.in/albums/B095DYDSTV
♪YouTube Music :  https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=W85Z4rFrm1M&feature=share
♪Wynk : https://wynk.in/music/album/hostel-life/bl_3616555945825
♪Hungama : https://www.hungama.com/song/hostel-life/66367299/
♪Resso :https://m.resso.app/ZSJaRU3e3/

Operator Codes : 

● Airtel & Airtel Hellotune Link :  Airtel Subscribers to Set as Hello tune Click on Wynk music link 
https://wynk.in/music/album/hostel-life/bl_3616555945825


Credits :

Song : Hostel Life
Singer/Lyricist/Composer : Khasa Aala Chahar (https://www.instagram.com/khasa_aala_chahar/)
Starring : Khasa Aala Chahar, Priya Soni
Music : Bamboo Beats
Mix/Master  : D Chandu
Dop : Parkash Kumar 
Focus - Boota Ji 
Ad : Ashok Jangra ,Rohit Choudhary , Ashok Sarwata 
Edit/Di : Monti 
Location : Gd Goenka School Hisar
Production : Addi Kalyan
Special Thanks : Khaas Group(Sumit, Rohit, Pardeep, Sidharth, Pony, Mukesh)
Concept/Screenplay/Direction : Ameet Choudhary 
(https://www.instagram.com/ameetchoudhary.in/?utm_medium=copy_link)
Social Media Promotions : HOT (Hub Of Talent)
Produced By : Gunbir Singh Sidhu & Manmord Sidhu

Lyrics :

1 hostel naam ka pinjra tha jit panchi sare ajad the
Vo beskimti dor tha yaara ne le svaad the
Gateman mahare aadhi the
Re pakae yaar jugadi the
Or game koi khelya na bottle ke yaar khiladi the
Room ke kundi lake ne patiala peg banake ne
Fer jump marke doli te re laage race takake ne

Je munna bolya circuit te
Apun ko baapu dikhta hai
Oye tane kaya toh final se
Bhai dikhta hai toh dikhta hai
Han tdikhta hai bhai dikhta hai
Han tum bhi bolo dikhta hai
Dikhta hai bhai dikhta hai han sare bolo dikhta hai
Je baat samjah main aai na
Mein achi ju samjha dunga
Ya legend life ki kahani saste main kukar gaa dyunga

Koi khaan peen ka daku tha
1 chashme aala padhaku tha
Par 1 bat toh common thi sala sara gang ladaku tha
1 landi yamha yara ki college ke gedhe laave thi
Oh ne dekh dekh sab shocking the
Yaara ke nedhe ave thi
1 dekhi surat pyari thi
Yara ki adhi grari thi
Uske chakra mein chet dia re jiske gela yari thi

Hostel aala ne bhar karya
Fer nakli baapu tyar karya
Yaara ne maafi milgi thi
Emotional atyachar krya 
3 idiot aali situation yaara ke bhitar banri thi
Virus toh nayre paare tha yaari fevicol te judh ri thi
Sab saanjha soda yaara ka
Na kise chij main farak karya
Jo bol dia vo hona tha na fer dobara tark karya

Tera keval mann ka beham se oye
Na din ye laut ke aave se
Chal chod tu khasa aale oye tu kyu ji ne tarsave se
Fursat ke mah aaio re va mehfil fer sajani se
Yaanepan main jo judh gi thi va yari bhi nibhani se
Re legend kathe hovenge jo tatkalin kirdaar the
Tu aaj suni se kahani jo ve mere jigri yaar the
Ooooaaaaaa


Subscribe us on :-

YouTube : https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCQuLyitHTE9LfUAxlhDfgig?view_as=subscriber
Facebook : - https://www.facebook.com/White-Hill-Dhaakad-100157068292167/
Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/whitehilldhaakad/?hl=en
Website : https://www.whitehillstudios.com

Published Year : 2021
Copyright : White Hill Beats Private Limited

snippet.title: Wrestler Sushil Kumar और पहलवान Sagar Dhankad के बीच क्यों चली आ रही थी लंबी अनबन| News Tak
snippet.description:
सुशील कुमार सागर धनखड़ से कुछ बातों पर ज़्यादा ही गुस्सा थे और इसलिए उन्होंने सागर और उसके साथियों को अगवा कर कुछ इतनी बुरी तरह से पीटा कि सागर की इसमें मौत तक हो गई. बताया जा रहा है कि सुशील कुमार और सागर धनखड़ के बीच फ्लैट के किराए का एक छोटा-सा विवाद था. जो आगे चलकर बढ़ता ही चला गया.
For Advertising queries, please give us a missed call on  +917827000333   Or mail us at  Mobiletak@aajtak.com

न्यूज़ तक (news tak) आपको देता है ख़बरों का बिल्कुल नया अंदाज । 40 सेकंड के छोटे गरमा-गरम वीडियो तो हैं ही साथ में न्यूज़ तक (news tak) के यू ट्यूब प्लेटफॉर्म पर आपको मिलेंगे दिलचस्प और EXCLUSIVE इंटरव्यू, वो भी अनकट..यहां आपको मिलेगा न्यूज़तक (news tak) स्पेशल, न्यूज़ तक (news tak) LIVE और भी बहुत कुछ। राजनीति, बॉलीवुड, देश-विदेश हर तरह की ख़बरों से जुड़े मनोरंजक वीडियो के लिए देखिए सिर्फ न्यूज़ तक (news tak)। क्या है वायरल होने वाले वीडियो की सच्चाई? ख़बर में ऐसा क्या था खास जो आप नहीं देख पाए? कोई भी ख़बर वायरल होने से पहले आप तक पहुंचाएगा न्यूज़ तक (news tak) । हर रोज दिलचस्प और गरमा-गरम वीडियो के लिए सब्सक्राइब कीजिए न्यूज़ तक (news tak)। ये है न्यूज़तक (news tak) का Official Channel.

News Tak is the most revolutionary and credible news channel on YouTube. News Tak brings news to you in an innovative VOD style that is set to capture and satiate your thirst for NEWS. This is the most credible source of Live videos that bring to you PC done by all political parties. From exclusive interviews to politics, bolly & Viral videos, anything and everything that is happening around the world is on News Tak. We ensure that the truth behind viral videos reaches you.We save you from rumours. This is the most reliable source of news that you can rely on. Subscribe to the official channel of News Tak here.

snippet.title: ആദ്യമായി നടത്തിയ Q and A വീഡിയോയ്ക്കിടയിൽ സ്നേഹമോൾക് എന്താ സംഭവിച്ചത് 😔കരഞ്ഞുകൊണ്ട് ഷിനോ😭😣😔
snippet.description:
ആദ്യം തന്നെ നമ്മടെ Q & A ൽ ചോദ്യം ചോദിച്ച എല്ലാവരോടും ഉള്ള നന്ദി അറിയിക്കുന്നു 😍😘
അതേപോലെ സമയ പരിധിമൂലം 2 part ആയിട്ടാണ് വീഡിയോ ഇട്ടിരിക്കുന്നത്
ഇന്ന് ഇട്ടിരിക്കുന്നത് part-1 ആണ്..ഇതിന്റെ ഇടയിൽ കുറേ ബഹളങ്ങൾ ഇവിടെ ഉണ്ടായി..അത് നിങ്ങൾക്ക് വീഡിയോയിൽ കാണാവുന്നതാണ്..കൂടുതൽ ചോദ്യങ്ങളുടെ ഉത്തരം part-2 ൽ ആണ് ഉള്ളത്..താമസിക്കാതെ അതും upload ചെയ്യുന്നതാണ്...തെറ്റുകൾ ഉണ്ടങ്കിൽ ദയവ് ചെയ്ത് ക്ഷമിക്കുക 🙏കമന്റുകൾ രേഖപെടുത്തുക 😊കുറവുകൾ തീർത് അടുത്തൊരു നല്ലൊരു വീഡിയോയുമായി വരുന്നതുവരെ by❤
@Oru adaar family
.
.
ഫ്രണ്ട്സ് അതേപോലെ ഇതാണ് നമ്മുടെ instagram account link.
നമ്മുടെ ചെറിയ വിശേഷങ്ങൾ അവിടെയും ഉണ്ട് കേട്ടോ..ഇവിടെ കണ്ടിട്ട് അങ്ങട് പോന്നേക്ക് 😍😄
https://instagram.com/shino_ms_official?igshid=1booiyx9q4l1t
.
.
sneha mol- https://instagram.com/sneha_shibu3?igshid=65p9ovg7027b
.
facebook link-

 (oru adaar family) : https://www.facebook.com/shinoms03/

snippet.title: CYCLONE YAAS LIVE UPDATES:  কালই অতি শক্তিশালী ঘূর্ণিঝড়ে পরিণত হবে ইয়াস I ABP ANANDA
snippet.description:
গতি বাড়িয়ে আগেই আছড়ে পড়তে পারে ঘূর্ণিঝড় ইয়াস। বঙ্গোপসাগরে গভীর নিম্নচাপ ইতিমধ্যেই পরিণত হয়েছে ঘূর্ণিঝড়ে। ধেয়ে আসছে বাংলা-ওড়িশা উপকূলের দিকে। বুধবার দুপুরের পরই আছড়ে পড়তে পারে ঘূর্ণিঝড় ‘ইয়াস’। দিঘা থেকে এখন ৬২০ কিমি দূরে রয়েছে ঘূর্ণিঝড়। 

মৌসম ভবন জানিয়েছে, ক্রমশ উত্তর ও উত্তর পশ্চিম দিকে এগোচ্ছে এই ঘূর্ণিঝড়।আগামীকাল অতি শক্তিশালী ঘূর্ণিঝড়ে পরিণত হবে। বুধবার সকাল থেকেই দাপট দেখাতে শুরু করবে ঘূর্ণিঝড় ইয়াস। দুপুরের পর আছড়ে পড়তে পারে পারাদ্বীপ ও সাগরদ্বীপের মাঝে স্থলভূমিতে। দিঘা থেকে বালেশ্বরের মধ্যে স্থলভাগে ঢোকার সম্ভাবনা প্রবল। স্থলভাগে ঢোকার সময় সর্বোচ্চ গতিবেগ ঘণ্টায় ১৮৫ কিলোমিটার হতে পারে। আবহাওয়া দফতর জানিয়েছে, আজ দুপুরের পর থেকে রাজ্যের উপকূলবর্তী জেলাগুলোতে বৃষ্টি শুরু হবে। কাল থেকে দক্ষিণবঙ্গে বাড়বে বৃষ্টি। 
#CycloneYaas #Yaas #ABPAnanda

মৌসম ভবন জানিয়েছে, ক্রমশ উত্তর ও উত্তর পশ্চিম দিকে এগোচ্ছে এই ঘূর্ণিঝড়।আগামীকাল অতি শক্তিশালী ঘূর্ণিঝড়ে পরিণত হবে। বুধবার সকাল থেকেই দাপট দেখাতে শুরু করবে ঘূর্ণিঝড় ইয়াস। দুপুরের পর আছড়ে পড়তে পারে পারাদ্বীপ ও সাগরদ্বীপের মাঝে স্থলভূমিতে। দিঘা থেকে বালেশ্বরের মধ্যে স্থলভাগে ঢোকার সম্ভাবনা প্রবল। স্থলভাগে ঢোকার সময় সর্বোচ্চ গতিবেগ ঘণ্টায় ১৮৫ কিলোমিটার হতে পারে। আবহাওয়া দফতর জানিয়েছে, আজ দুপুরের পর থেকে রাজ্যের উপকূলবর্তী জেলাগুলোতে বৃষ্টি শুরু হবে। কাল থেকে দক্ষিণবঙ্গে বাড়বে বৃষ্টি। 
#CycloneYaas #Yaas #ABPAnanda
________________________________________________________________
Subscribe to our YouTube channel here: https://www.youtube.com/user/abpanandatv


#ABPAnanda #CycloneYaas 

About Channel:

ABP Ananda is a regional news hub which provides you with the comprehensive up-to-date news coverage from West Bengal and all over India and World. Get the latest top stories, current affairs, sports, business, entertainment, politics, spirituality, and many more here only on ABP Ananda.

ABP Ananda maintains the repute of being a people's channel. Its cutting-edge formats, state-of-the-art newsrooms commands the attention of million Bengalis weekly.

snippet.title: King - Koo Koo (Explicit) ft.Jaz & Aesap | The Gorilla Bounce | Prod. by Dev | Latest Hit Songs 2021
snippet.description:
✅🔥Follow🤴🏾On Instagram🔥✅
https://www.instagram.com/ifeelking

Artist - King
Featured Artists - Jaz & Asap
Lyrics By - King , Jaz & Asap
https://youtube.com/channel/UCFbZSBZgHo0wiH0r1Hw1yMQ
Composed By - King
Directed By - Yash Chhabra
Music Produced By - Devmusic
Mix & Master By - Rahul Sathu
King’s Costume Designer - Drutika Singh


This album is in association with KingsclanMGMT.
Digitally marketed By Kingsclan Marketing
Edit By Yash Chhabra
Digitally Handled By KingsclanMGMT

Shows,Business and Bookings 🍾🌹
📮kingsclanmgmt@gmail.com

#King​ #kookoo​ #thegorillabounce


LYRICS:

(ASAP) verse

I say wooo ! 
Hawa aney do ! 
raate hui rangeen 
Hauley jhume meri soul 

I say wooo ! 
Huwe pone 2
Mausam badla tab jub 
Suraj dhalke taare kare glow 

I know 
Baby tujhe chahiye mera saath 
Aur gedi lagey wo bhi slow slow 

No no no ! 
Lowkey rehne do 
Nazre chrao na 
Ankho ko kehne do 
 
Kehne ko
bhot kuch
Lagun tich 
Bande sick 
Mare Hit
Baby photo bhi khichwari jaari 
saath Click click 

Mare shows 
chhape note 
Number one 
On the board 

koi ghamand nahi pala 
Bhale kaam top-notch
Yaari rakhi on the top 
Party baje nonstop 
Champagne pop it up

Haseen hui chali raatein 
toh phir unme kesa khouf 
Hum lutein puri mouj 
BeyAsar thi kharonch 
Yeh jungle hai cheete 
shikaar kaa bhi shauq

CHANTS / HOOK

(JAZ) verse

Verse

Karo bounce bounce bounce mere sath mein 
Mai jeetu dil jab kalam pakdu hath mai 
Ajj dark skin munda kare glow 
Hai seena chawda zindagi mai jiyu shaan se 

Na na na na 

Kbhi nazare jhukau na bas yehi hai usool !
Hai unko bhi pyar jo gaye mujhe bhool
Bund marate ye piche aage bante hai cool
Lokki karde a galla appa karde a rule....

Om my god ! 

Bade checks badi soch 
Munde roz lere mauj 
Pura josh nahi hosh 
High class mere flows 
Jinne bhi thay tezz mere aage aaj sare hue slow slow slow
 
Ohh no ! 

Jaha per dhare shor bande aam nahi 
Ek ke baad ek hit halka kaam nahi nahi 
Mai feel mai hu karo pareshan nahi 
Hit hu mai pehle se bas abhi mera naan nahi !

CHANTS / HOOK

(KING) verse

Karaan main fly high par pair rakhan thalle,
Duniya di feel len Raja baitha kalle,
Jo waqt palte jaani sher ka vo bachha,
Na to muh to hai mufat kuch to bolenge hi dalle.

Aafat macha di maine zamane se puch lo
Aur peeche koi hath mere esi koi baat nahi hai,

Akela nikla tha main ghar se ek sapna leke
Aaj koi aesa nahi jo khada mere sath nahi hai.

Kingsclan flow!
Shawty get low!

Industry khichhan mere latte kehndi edda na karo! No! No! No!
Raja jaane do...
Ye bachhe hain humare inhe gana gaane do.

Kar diya bounce
Lo bhar diya maine account
Lo aa rahi firse album ek aur kardo sabmein announce.

Jaise aasmaan - zameen ka mile chhod nahi
Vaise yaar ka tere bhi koi todh nahi.

CHANTS / HOOK

#KhanSir #KhanSirRealName 

Hailing from Patna, Khan Sir is a popular face in the internet world owing to his video lectures on various subjects related to General Studies. Quite recently, a small clip from one of his videos published in the month of April highlighting the relations between Pakistan and France started making rounds on the internet. Many people criticized him for igniting hate against a particular community as per his statements in the said video clip on Twitter using #ReportOnKhanSir. The things escalated further when another set of video clips surfaced wherein Khan Sir was seen saying that some people know him by the name 'Amit Singh'. We had a word with 'Khan Sir' to clear the air and here's how he responded.

snippet.title: The Weeknd - The Weeknd – Save Your Tears (Live on The 2021 Billboard Music Awards)
snippet.description:
“Save Your Tears” (Live at The 2021 Billboard Music Awards) 

'After Hours' available everywhere now: http://theweeknd.co/afterhoursYD 

►Subscribe to The Weeknd on YouTube: http://theweeknd.co/subscribeYD 

►Get exclusive merch: shop.theweeknd.com

https://twitter.com/theweeknd
https://www.facebook.com/theweeknd
https://www.instagram.com/theweeknd
https://www.theweeknd.com 

Directed by Alex Lill
Produced by Brendan Garrett
Production Company:  Bucket Pictures 

Lyrics:

Ooh
Na na, yeah
I saw you dancing in a crowded room
You look so happy when I'm not with you
But then you saw me, caught you by surprise
A single teardrop falling from your eye
I don't know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
You could've asked me why I broke your heart
You could've told me that you fell apart
But you walked past me like I wasn't there
And just pretended like you didn't care
I don't know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
Take me back 'cause I wanna stay
Save your tears for another
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day
So
I made you think that I would always stay
I said some things that I should never say
Yeah, I broke your heart like someone did to mine
And now you won't love me for a second time
I don't know why I run away, oh, girl
Said I make you cry when I run away
Girl, take me back 'cause I wanna stay
Save your tears for another
I realize that I'm much too late
And you deserve someone better
Save your tears for another day (Ooh, yeah)
Save your tears for another day (Yeah)
I don't know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
Save your tears for another day, ooh, girl (Ah)
I said save your tears for another day (Ah)
Save your tears for another day (Ah)
Save your tears for another day (Ah)

#TheWeeknd #SaveYourTears #AfterHours

snippet.title: 15 मिनट में मसाला डोसा बनाने की विधि - Instant Suji Se Masala Dosa Recipe CookingShooking
snippet.description:
Dosto, Suji se Instantly, 15 minute me Masala Dosa Banane ki Recipe le kar aaya hu, jarur bana ke try kariega..

CookingShooking ko jarur subscribe karein -  https://goo.gl/MH3A4r

Instagram me follow jarur karein - https://www.instagram.com/cooking.shooking

English videos - https://goo.gl/Sxk4Fp

Suji Masala Dosa - Ingredients:
6-7 Dosa ke lie
Suji - 1 cup
Besan - 1 tbsp
Gehu ka Atta - 1 tbsp
Namak - taste hisab se
Dahi - 1 cup
Pani - batter banane ke lie
Baking Soda - 1/4 tsp
Oil - Dosa sekne ke lie

Oil - 1 tbsp
Sarso - 1 tsp
Chana dal - 1 tbsp
Curry Leaves - 8-10
Hari Mirch - 1
Ginger - 1 inch
Pyaaz - 1 slices, large size ke
Salt - to taste
Haldi Powder - 1/2 tsp
Red Chilli Powder - 1/4 tsp
Aloo - 5 (boiled, peeled, chopped)
Hara Dhania - 2 tbsp

Kitchen Products
Measuring Cup & Spoon Set - https://amzn.to/2KZBVpq
Chopper for Fine Cutting - https://amzn.to/2UCCo7X
Mixer Grinder - https://amzn.to/2XTI1jW 
Power Blender for Smoothie, Shakes - https://amzn.to/37ozHM6
Hand Blender+Mixer+Chopper - https://amzn.to/2MOHjhL
Gas Sandwich Griller - https://amzn.to/37mvfgW
Good NonStick Pan - https://amzn.to/2zl0hsa (steel spoon safe)
Kitchen Weight Scale - https://amzn.to/2ug3G65 
Instant Yeast - https://amzn.to/2N2wzuf (keep in freezer)
Instant Yeast - https://amzn.to/2KZSkdn (small pack)
Pizza Screen - https://amzn.to/2m4zpn6 (3 pack - 6,7,8 inches)
Parchment Paper - much better than butter paper, and it is reusable - https://amzn.to/2MZFGvC
Whipping Cream - https://amzn.to/2ugPB8m
Oven For Baking - https://amzn.to/2udP3A5 (28liter Good for 3-4 people)

Oil - Dosa sekne ke lie

Oil - 1 tbsp
Sarso - 1 tsp
Chana dal - 1 tbsp
Curry Leaves - 8-10
Hari Mirch - 1
Ginger - 1 inch
Pyaaz - 1 slices, large size ke
Salt - to taste
Haldi Powder - 1/2 tsp
Red Chilli Powder - 1/4 tsp
Aloo - 5 (boiled, peeled, chopped)
Hara Dhania - 2 tbsp

snippet.title: ബ്ലാക്ക് ഫങ്കസും വൈറ്റ് ഫങ്കസും പിടിപെടാതിരിക്കാൻ ശ്രദ്ധിക്കേണ്ട പ്രധാനകാര്യങ്ങൾ.അറിവ് ഷെയർചെയ്യുക
snippet.description:
ഇന്ന് കോവിഡിനെക്കാൾ ഭയപ്പെടുന്ന രോഗമാണ് ബ്ലാക്ക് ഫങ്കസ്.
0:00 ബ്ലാക്ക് ഫങ്കസ്
2:00 കോവിഡ് രോഗികള്‍ക്ക് വരുന്നത് എന്ത് കൊണ്ട്?
3:00 ആര്‍ക്കൊക്കെ വരാന്‍ സാധ്യതയുണ്ട്?
4:09 എങ്ങനെ ഒഴിവാക്കാം?
6:00 മാസ്ക്ക് വില്ലനാകുന്നുണ്ടോ?
8:00 എങ്ങനെ തിരിച്ചറിയാം?

 കോവിഡ് കഴിഞ്ഞവർക്ക് എന്തുകൊണ്ട് ബ്ലാക്ക് ഫങ്കസ് രോഗം പിടിപെടുന്നു ? ബ്ലാക്ക് ഫങ്കസ് രോഗം ഒഴിവാക്കാൻ നാം ശ്രദ്ധിക്കേണ്ട ചില പ്രധാന കാര്യങ്ങൾ എന്തെല്ലാം ? വിശദമായി അറിയുക. ഒരുപാടുപേർക്ക് ഉപകാരപ്പെടുന്ന ഇൻഫർമേഷൻ ആണിത് 

For Appointments  Please Call 90 6161 5959

snippet.title: Fikar Kari Na Ammiye (Trailer) | Ranjit Bawa | Babbu | Desi Crew | Teji Sandhu | punjabi Song 2021
snippet.description:
Singer / Composer: Ranjit Bawa
Lyrcis: Babbu
Music: Desi Crew
Poetry: Kahlon
Special Thanks : Honey Sarkar
Video: Teji Sandhu
Editor: Mr Editor
Poster: Dhiman Productions
Stills: TJ Sidhu
Online Promotion: Baaj Media
Label: Ranjit Bawa 

Poetry In Punjabi:
ਡਿਗਦੇ ਰਹੇ ਹਾਂ, ਸੱਟਾਂ ਵੀ ਖਾਦੀਆਂ
ਫੇਰ ਕਿਹੜੀ ਗੱਲ ਆ, ਤੂੰ ਸਿਖਾਇਆ ਏ ਨਾ ਮੈਨੂੰ
ਮੁੜ ਕੇ ਉੱਠਣਾ
ਹਾਰ ਦਾ ਗਮ ਵੀ ਕੀਤਾ, ਜਿੱਤ ਕੇ ਚਾਅ ਵੀ ਕੀਤੇ
ਪਰ ਚੱਲਦਾ ਰਹਿਣਾ ਟੁੱਟ ਕੇ ਜੁੜਨਾ ਤੇ ਜੁੜ ਕੇ ਫੇਰ ਟੁੱਟਣਾ
ਰੁਕਿਆ ਨਹੀ ਮੈਂ ਬੱਸ
ਲੱਭ ਰਿਹਾ ਹਾਂ ਮੈਂ, ਮੇਰੇ ਚੋਂ ਮੈਨੂੰ
ਇੱਕ ਦਿਨ ਮੈਂ ਕੱਢਾਂਗਾ, ਹਨੇਰੇ ਚੋਂ ਮੈਨੂੰ

ਡਿਗਦੇ ਰਹੇ ਹਾਂ, ਸੱਟਾਂ ਵੀ ਖਾਦੀਆਂ
ਫੇਰ ਕਿਹੜੀ ਗੱਲ ਆ, ਤੂੰ ਸਿਖਾਇਆ ਏ ਨਾ ਮੈਨੂੰ
ਮੁੜ ਕੇ ਉੱਠਣਾ
ਹਾਰ ਦਾ ਗਮ ਵੀ ਕੀਤਾ, ਜਿੱਤ ਕੇ ਚਾਅ ਵੀ ਕੀਤੇ
ਪਰ ਚੱਲਦਾ ਰਹਿਣਾ ਟੁੱਟ ਕੇ ਜੁੜਨਾ ਤੇ ਜੁੜ ਕੇ ਫੇਰ ਟੁੱਟਣਾ
ਰੁਕਿਆ ਨਹੀ ਮੈਂ ਬੱਸ
ਲੱਭ ਰਿਹਾ ਹਾਂ ਮੈਂ, ਮੇਰੇ ਚੋਂ ਮੈਨੂੰ

snippet.title: Lawyer vs Doctor vs ChessGM. #RandomDebate. @Siddharth Warrier @Prakhar ke Pravachan
snippet.description:
Having fun and a random stream with Prakhar & Dr.Sid.
Drop in the topics you want us to talk about over here! https://twitter.com/prvkhvr/status/1396797896100499462?s=20

PS: You can check out my New Graphy course: MASTERING CHESS TECHNIQUES
It has just got much, much better! Apart from me, you will have constant guidance from my assistant trainer! (IM)
1) 8 hours of Training (6 hrs - GM Vidit + 2 hrs - Trainer)
2) 2 complimentary tournaments/events.
3) Game analysis with Trainer.
4) Additional notes/resources, puzzles.
5) Access to Vidit's exclusive Chess community on Discord/Chess group.
6) The Golden Run subscription (Free).
7) Certificate on completion of course.
For more info: https://bit.ly/3sTwRrJ

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - तारक मेहता का उल्टा चशमाह - Episode 817 - Full Episode
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to SAB TV Channel: https://www.youtube.com/user/sabtv?sub_confirmation=1

Click to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7Zfu1x9Bd1UqLwUxhZ1oBJh

The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in Gokuldham Co-operative Society and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.Click here to Subscribe to SAB TV Channel: https://www.youtube.com/user/sabtv?sub_confirmation=1

Click to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7Zfu1x9Bd1UqLwUxhZ1oBJh

Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. snippet.title: Giftaan | Shambhavi Thakur ft. Jumana Khan & Abhinav Shekhar | Love Song 2021 | BLive Music
snippet.description:
Sanjay Kukreja and BLive Music presents official video of new hindi romantic song "Giftaan" sung by Abhinav Shekhar & Shambhavi Thakur and featuring Jumana Khan & Abhinav Shekhar. The lyrics are penned by Moody Akkhar & Abhinav Shekhar. The music is given by Ramji Gulati and the video is directed by United White Flag. This song is created by Mahesh Kukreja.

#Giftaan #ShambhaviThakur #AbhinavShekhar #JumanaKhan #NewRomanticSong

Song - Giftaan
Singer - Abhinav Shekhar & Shambhavi Thakur

snippet.title: Want To Heal Your Emotional Pain? Watch This | Gaur Gopal Das
snippet.description: We all go through emotional pain and at times it is unbearable. It looks like there’s no light at the end of the tunnel. And Covid 19 has surely gotten us there. With all our lives getting affected and so much happening, that same pain keeps constantly nagging us and makes us feel worthless, empty and melancholy. What we fail to realise is that going through that pain, experiencing it is also a part of healing. It takes time for things to settle and as they often say, it takes time for time to pass by. We’re not early, we’re not late, we’re just on time. Watch this video to know more on healing and emotional pain!

snippet.title: Nayantara - Full Episode | 22 May 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Nayantara" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Nayantara: After 10 years of marriage, Adidev (Gourab Mondal) and Averi (Payal De) are about to experience parenthood with the birth of their first child. The doctor warns Avery that she might face life threatening complications if she decides to go ahead with the child birth. Averi does not tell Adidev about this because she wants to give him the happiness of fatherhood and be a mother herself. On the other hand, Avery means the world to Adidev, so he will definitely chose her life over the child. Avery gives birth to Tara (Hiya Mukherjee). Avery dies within a few minutes of Tara’s birth. The doctor informs Adidev that he had warned Avery but she did not listen. Adidev, who was already devastated by his wife's death, comes to know that the Income Tax Department had raided his office. Adidev starts to believe that Tara is the source of the misfortune in his life and hatred grows in his heart for Tara. On the other hand, Adidev's second wife Madhuja (Swarnakamal) loves Tara more than her own daughter Preeti. But Adideb can’t tolerate that either. Tara's only wish, will she ever get his father's affection?

snippet.title: Cyclone Yaas: यास तूफान से किन राज्यों पर पड़ेगा असर? | Speed | Landfall | Latest Update | Warning
snippet.description:
Which states will be affected by Yaas cyclone?
The cyclone is likely to make landfall between Paradip and Sagar islands on evening of May 26 with a wind speed of 155- 165 kmph gusting to 185 kmph, a storm surge warning of about 2-4 meters has been issued by the IMD .

Cyclone Yaas: यास तूफान से किन राज्यों पर पड़ेगा असर?
 26 मई को ही शाम तक तूफान की रफ्तार 155-165 किमी प्रति घंटा तक जा सकती है.

snippet.title: 15 മിനുറ്റിൽ 3 കറികളും കൂട്ടി ഒരു ഊണ് || Lockdown Menu || No Coconut || 3 Dishes in 15 minutes
snippet.description:
Hello dear friends, this is my 498th Vlog. In this video demonstrate How to make Easy Mutta Porichathum & Vanpayar Ularthu

How to make Easy Mutta Porichathum & Vanpayar Ularthu

Dry red  chillies - 6 nos
Small onion - 5 - 6 nos
Tamarind - 1 Lemon Size
Salt( according to taste )
Water
Coconut oil - 11/2  - 2 tbs
........................................................

Vanpayar Ularthu

Red cowpeas ( Perumpayar / vanpayar ) - 11/2 Cup
Turmeric powder - 1/2 tsp
Salt( according to taste )
Coconut oil - 11/2 tbs
Mustard Seeds - 1tsp
Dry red  chillies - 3 - 4 nos
Curry Leaves
Small onion - 8 nos   ( Crushed )
Garlic - 2 Big Flakes ( Crushed )
Big onion - 1 nos ( Half Sliced )
Crushed dry red chillies - 11/2 tbs
..........................................................


Mutta Porichathum

Coconut oil -  2 tbs
Curry Leaves
Eggs - 4 nos
Turmeric powder - 1/4 tsp
Coriander Powder - 11/2 tbs
Kashmiri chilli powder - 1 tbs
Salt( according to taste )
Vinegar - 1/2  -  1 tsp

Please share your valuable feedback's through the comment box.
Don't forget to Like, Share and Subscribe. Love you all :)

snippet.title: NEW! Ep 3169 - Jethalal Takes Bapuji on a Trip! | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer
Munmun Dutta as Babita Krishnan Iyer
Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide
Sonalika Joshi as Madhvi Aatmaram Bhide
Nidhi Bhanushali / Palak Sidhwani as Sonalika Aatmaram Bhide (Sonu) 
Gurucharan Singh/ Balwinder suri as Roshan Singh Harjeet Singh Sodhi
Jennifer Mistry Bansiwal as Roshan Kaur Roshan Singh Sodhi
Kavi Kumar Azad / Nirmal Soni as Dr. Hansraj Hathi 
Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj Hathi
Kush Shah as Gulabkumar Hansraj Hathi (Goli)
Shyam Pathak as Popatlal Pandey
Sharad Sankla as Abdul
Azhar Shaikh as Pinku 

Produced By: Neela Asit Modi, Asit Kumarr Modi 
Special Thanks: Mahesh Vakil, Indu Tarak Mehta
Set Design: Jayant Deshmukh
On-Air Promotion  ( SAB): SAB OAP
Costume Designer: Alka Mehta
Costume Stylist: Ekta Brahmbhatt
Sound Recordist: Shakeel Mansuri 
Cameraman: Aamir Virani
Production Head: Arvind Marchande
Production Controler: Vinod Shishupal
Background Music: Sunil Patni
Online Editors: Vishal Tambe, Sandeep Singh 
Executive Producer: Jatin Yogesh Bajaj
Editor: Dinesh Gosavi, Kaushal Mistry, Devang Modi, Vinod Maurya

Operation Head: Sohil Ramani

Directors: Harshad Joshi, Malav Suresh Rajda

Television Adaptation and Designed By: Asit Kumarr Modi

snippet.description:
Recipe : Wheat flour breakfast recipe in Kannada / simple breakfast recipe in lockdown / Wheat flour snacks Recipe / wheat flour healthy breakfast recipe / healthy breakfast in lockdown / less oil breakfast recipe / Wheat flour snacks Recipe /amazing breakfast Recipe / less oil breakfast recipes.


Ingredients :

Chapathi batter(2 cup wheat, salt-1/2 tsp, cooking oil-2 tbs)
Onion(sliced)-4
Carrot (grated)-1
Gren chilli (chopped)-3
Ginger garlic paste-1 tsp
Capsicum (chopped)-1/4 cup
Turmeric powder-1/4 tsp
Garam masala powder-1/2 tsp
Jeera powder-1/2 tsp
Red chilli powder-1/2 tsp
Coriander leaves-1/4 cup
Jeera-1 tsp
Salt for taste
Cooking oil
Idli maker

snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Harano Sur" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Harano Sur: Shashanka Shekhar, the music maestro, is spellbound by Ahana’s singing and wants to get her married to his son Nakshatra. He is inclined towards popular music over classical & is more renowned than his father. He is against marrying a singer. Coincidentally, he also meets Ahana & she appears to be someone who doesn’t care about his celebrity status or lavish lifestyle. He gets married to Ahana, without knowing about her singing abilities. What will happen when Nakshatra gets to know about Ahana’s singing abilities? Will music cause divide between them?

He is inclined towards popular music over classical & is more renowned than his father. He is against marrying a singer. Coincidentally, he also meets Ahana & she appears to be someone who doesn’t care about his celebrity status or lavish lifestyle. He gets married to Ahana, without knowing about her singing abilities. What will happen when Nakshatra gets to know about Ahana’s singing abilities? Will music cause divide between them?

snippet.description:
Hi guys,

This video features me and few of my lovely pets spending quality time in this pleasant climate. 

I’ve given 3 of my horses Majeed , Boney and Torque freedom to run around freely and have some fun.

Mougli unexpectedly fell into the fish pond, but nothing to worry he is safe.

I hope everything is going well and each of you are safe and healthy. 
Stay safe❤️

snippet.title: गेहूँ के आटे से ऐसे दानेदार-सॉफ़्ट गुलाब जामुन बनाकर हैरान हो जाएगे । Wheat Flour Soft Gulab Jamun
snippet.description:
New Channel Link - https://youtu.be/KEDyHA7lKhY

गेहूँ के आटे से ऐसे दानेदार-सॉफ़्ट गुलाब जामुन बनाकर हैरान हो जाएगे । Wheat Flour Soft Gulab Jamun 

#Gulabjamun#EasySweetRecipe#AataGulabjamun

Ingredients:-

Wheat Flour-1/2 cup
Milk Powder-1/2 cup
Milk-1/3 cup
Ghee-2-3 tbsp
Sugar-1.5 cup
Baking Soda-1/4 tsp
Cardamom Powder-1/2 tsp
Oil/Ghee-For Frying 
Few Saffron Strands(optional)

snippet.title: ஒரு துளி எண்ணெய் இல்லாமல் பூந்தி பொறிக்காமல் ஈஸியான பேக்கரி லட்டு | Laddu Recipe in Tamil | Laddoo

INGREDIENTS USED,

1 Cup= 200gm/200ml
Total Quantity= 10 to 15 Laddoos

Water- as required

snippet.title: Friends: The Reunion | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
Our favorite friends are back on the set that started it all. Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow, Matt LeBlanc, Matthew Perry, David Schwimmer, and special guests reunite to discuss everything from their casting process to whether or not Ross and Rachel were really on a break. Witness the unbreakable bond of the group that perfectly captured the moment in life when your friends become your family.

Stream Friends: The Reunion May 27 on HBO Max.

Disclaimer| | |
ഈ ചാനലിലൂടെ ഞങ്ങൾ പ്രസിദ്ധീകരിക്കുന്ന
വീഡിയോകളിൽ ഒരുതരത്തിലുമുള്ള
രാഷ്ട്രീയ, സാമുദായിക, മതപരമായ ഒരു
വേർതിരിവുമില്ല. ഗവൺമെന്റ് സ്കീമുകൾ
ഏത് നിമിഷവും എപ്പോൾ വേണമെങ്കിലും
മാറ്റം സംഭവിക്കാം . ആയതിനാൽ ഞങ്ങൾ
പ്രസിദ്ധീകരിക്കുന്ന പുതിയ വീഡിയോ
അപ്ഡേഷനുകൾ കാണുവാൻ ശ്രമിക്കുക
#muneerhistoryvlogs
𝗖𝗼𝘃𝗶𝗱-𝟭𝟵 𝗟𝗼𝗰𝗸𝗱𝗼𝘄𝗻 - 𝗧𝗿𝗮𝘃𝗲𝗹 𝗣𝗮𝘀𝘀
കോവിഡ് 19 രണ്ടാം  തരംഗത്തെ തുടർന്ന്  ഏർപ്പെടുത്തിയിട്ടുള്ള  നിയന്ത്രണങ്ങളുടെ പശ്ചാത്തലത്തില്‍ പൊതുജനങ്ങള്‍ക്ക് അത്യാവശ്യ സാഹചര്യത്തില്‍ യാത്ര ചെയ്യുന്നതിനാവശ്യമായ പാസ് ലഭിക്കുന്നതിന് ഓണ്‍ലൈന്‍ സംവിധാനം സജ്ജമാക്കിയാതായി സംസ്ഥാന പോലീസ് മേധാവി ലോക്നാഥ് ബെഹ്റ ഐപിഎസ്സ്  അറിയിച്ചു. 
https://pass.bsafe.kerala.gov.in
എന്ന ലിങ്ക് വഴി പൊതുജനങ്ങള്‍ക്ക് ഈ സൗകര്യം പ്രയോജനപ്പെടുത്താം. സൈബര്‍ഡോം നോഡല്‍ ഓഫീസര്‍  എഡിജിപി മനോജ് എബ്രഹാമിന്‍റെ നേതൃത്വത്തിലാണ് ഓണ്‍ലൈന്‍ സംവിധാനം വികസിപ്പിച്ചത്.
